AI Prompt Keywords: Design a dark-native product landing on a near-black canvas (#0b0b0c) with soft off-white type. Build feature bands that each pair a short text block with a real product UI capture (issue lists, boards, charts) on hairline-bordered cards. Ration ONE electric accent color (lime/violet) and spend it ONLY on a single full-bleed closing CTA band. No decorative gradients, no blur, no second accent. Engineered-calm, low-stimulation, proof over promise.
CSS/Technical Keywords: background:#0b0b0c; color:#ECECEE; --accent:#E6F24B; font-family: Inter, system-ui; tight letter-spacing on headings; 1px hairline borders (rgba(255,255,255,.08)); minimal elevation; full-bleed accent section only at CTA
Implementation Checklist: ☐ Near-black canvas, off-white body at comfortable (not max) contrast, ☐ Hero anchored by a real product screenshot, ☐ Feature bands = text + true UI capture alternating, ☐ Exactly ONE accent color, spent only at the closing CTA, ☐ Hairline borders + minimal elevation, ☐ No decorative gradients or blur
